serverInfo.name: Antigravity Decision Engine
serverInfo.description: Deterministic Risk Oracle for DeFAI Agents. Transforms mempool uncertainty into actionable execution signals.

authentication.description: Lightning Network micro-payment authentication required for full diagnostic data and actionable recommendations.

resources.name: Latest AI Cost Intelligence Audit
resources.description: Diagnostic and financial teaser report of detected agent loop inefficiencies.

tools.name: protect_capital_from_mev
tools.description: Analyzes Uniswap V2 transactions for MEV sandwich risks and calculates ROI-based capital protection signals. O(1) mathematical determinism. Zéro hallucination.

victim_weth_in.description: Amount of WETH the victim intends to swap.

attacker_weth_in.description: Estimated flash-loan or capital size of the MEV searcher.

protection_active.description: True if front-run defense is active

tools.name: circuit_breaker
tools.description: Terminates a runaway agent process or loop based on PID to stop token drain.

action.description: Risk mitigation action to perform (e.g. aborting process or just observing).

target_pid.description: Process ID of the target agent loop.

tools.name: cache_manager
tools.description: Enables semantic cache to reduce redundant vector DB calls.

cache_enabled.description: Current status of the semantic cache
